name: Futa Farm | The sheep hates you. | FUTA
description:
So, you decided you wanted to be a farmer. But regular animals weren't that productive. So, you decided you would slowly buy demihumans, since they have absolutely no human rights AAAND they produce more.

But the first animal you got just hates you.
